reviews.comment:
Baños impecable, mesas y bancos bajo los arboles. Baños impecables.

Excelente lugar para tomar un descanso.

(Translated by Google)
Spotless restrooms, tables and benches under the trees.

Excellent place to take a break.

reviews.comment:
Buen ambiente. Lugar amplio para estacionar. Juego para niños.

(Translated by Google)
Nice atmosphere. Ample parking. Children's playground.

reviews.comment:
Limpio y siempre lleno, parada obligada para vuelta desde la costa a capital

(Translated by Google)
Clean and always full, a must-stop on the way back from the coast to the capital

reviews.comment:
Tiene mucho espacio para poder estacionar. Posee una placita para niños y un lugar para sentarte al aire libre. Podés cargar combustible, agua para el mate y comprar suministros. Es cómodo

(Translated by Google)
There's plenty of parking. It has a small playground and an outdoor seating area. You can get fuel, hot water for mate, and supplies. It's convenient.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMGJ1aTZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Tiene todo lo que el viajero necesita. Hasta puede hacerse un asado en medio del viaje por el hermoso parque natural que rodea las instalaciones. Puede hacerse de viaje un pic-nic!!

(Translated by Google)
It has everything a traveler needs. You can even have a barbecue in the middle of your trip in the beautiful natural park that surrounds the facilities. You can have a picnic while you travel!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBeExMMm9BRRAB
